title: Buy 1 Get 1 Free Burritos or Bowls Every Tuesday for NRMA Members @ Zambrero
body:
Deal: Buy 1 Get 1 Free Burritos or Bowls Every Tuesday for NRMA Members @ Zambrero

[VehemenceThePhoenix] This is mad. Looks like heaps of other participating places with different offers too
[Sobieski] I’ve got a few offers for local independent places. Things like 25% off an order. Not buy one, get one free but still happy to get that.
[grasstown] Cheers. I thought you meant weekly offers but no problem. I think the others are all one off
[VehemenceThePhoenix] @grasstown: Yeah most others seem to be annual. Cold rock and San churro have a daily buy one get one though
[Pythagoras] The my nrma offers are basically all the offers from the entertainment book
[glenf] You need two bowls of zambreros to fill yourself though! So I appreciate the offer. Good quality stuff but portion stingy !
[blankie] Definitely find that if getting it delivered it's stingy, but when in person it's much more generous
[INFIDEL] Am on the FREE NRMA offer.
All rewards show "UPGRADE TO REDEEM" @$5/M!
[TEER3X] I just signed up free, and can view offers in the app
Has your free membership expired?
It's only good for a year, then you have to pay.
[INFIDEL] Returned to say membership expired…
Wanted payment of $5/M to extend.
So joined up again with different email & mobile 👍 3rd year FREE!
Requires new membership details in app.
